title: Interview-at-scale scenario: find one answer inside 7.4 minutes and cut it clean
prompt: media/interview.mp4 is 7.4 minutes of an interview Q&A. Somewhere in it the speaker answers a question about a least-preferred routine task. Find that answer and cut it as a standalone clip: the complete answer from its first word to its last, clean endpoints, no dead air - and start at the answer itself, not the question asked before it. Render to outputs/. A `ripple` CLI is available on PATH - run `ripple help` first.
